qa_pairs.question: I made a mistake and renewed my Alliance account with the wrong role. How can I correct this and renew with the right role?
qa_pairs.answer: You should create a new role with your current information and update your account. To do this, log into CCDB, go to 'My Account' in the main menu, and select 'Apply for a new role'. Follow the instructions to select your new role.

qa_pairs.question: Who is responsible for confirming my new role if I apply for one to correct a previous renewal mistake?
qa_pairs.answer: Your sponsor will receive an email with a link to a page where they can confirm this new role.

qa_pairs.question: What happens to my old role if I apply for a new one after accidentally renewing with the wrong role?
qa_pairs.answer: Your old role will automatically expire and be deactivated on the morning of June 11, 2025, if it is not renewed.
